title: Obsidian Armour
description: This Mod Adds Obsidian Armour To Minecraft!
body:
Features
Adds Obsidian Tools And Armour To Minecraft You craft them you normal armour but with obsidian.
![How The Armour Looks In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb3037954e530ed3d5cc0f633c171be485af8e7.png)


![How The Armour Looks In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb3037954e530ed3d5cc0f633c171be485af8e7.png)

Installation
You Can Download This Mod On Curseforge Or Modrinth!
